overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking across a wooden bridge and along a dirt path through lush summer countryside. The scene transitions from a river crossing through wildflower meadows to a lakeside trail with distant mountains and a settlement visible on the horizon.

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto dirt countryside path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily across the wooden bridge with swords strapped to his back, moving toward the countryside

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge deck
simple wooden fence railing on the left side of the bridge
simple wooden fence railing on the right side of the bridge
blue-green river water flowing beneath and alongside the bridge
dense green deciduous trees lining the riverbanks
hazy mountains visible on the horizon
round wooden barrels sitting on the right side of the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a wooden bridge over a river in a lush valley. The bridge features weathered planks and simple railings, with barrels placed on the right side. Forests line the riverbanks and mountains rise in the distance under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with stone walls and wildflower meadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the winding dirt path through meadows filled with colorful wildflowers and tall grass

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path winding through the countryside
low stone wall running along the right side of the path
fields of red poppies, purple lavender, and white flowers
green leafy shrubs growing alongside the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, Geralt walks along a dirt trail bordered by stone walls and vibrant wildflower meadows. The path winds through open countryside with dense forests visible in the distance, transitioning from the enclosed bridge to the open fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside trail with view of distant settlement and rock formations

events.description: lake becomes visible on the left and distant settlement with rock formations appears ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path with a lake now visible to the left and a distant settlement ahead

entered.detail: calm blue lake water visible through the trees on the left
cluster of buildings and structures visible in the valley ahead
tall pointed rock spires rising above the distant landscape
simple wooden post fence replacing the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to reveal a lake on the left side and a distant settlement with distinctive rock formations visible ahead. Geralt continues walking along the lakeside trail, passing wooden fences and stone walls as the landscape becomes more varied.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with dense vegetation on the right

events.description: character turns right to follow the curving path into denser vegetation

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns right to follow the winding path as it curves through denser vegetation and trees

entered.detail: thick green bushes and undergrowth lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the path curves, Geralt turns right and continues along a more densely vegetated trail. The lake remains visible on the left while the terrain becomes more forested, with thick foliage and trees lining the right side of the path, creating a more enclosed feeling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a river crossing in a lush valley to a densely vegetated lakeside trail. It begins with Geralt crossing a weathered wooden bridge lined with barrels, with forests and distant mountains visible under a bright midday sun. As he leaves the bridge behind, the scene opens into wide wildflower meadows where the path winds between stone walls and open countryside. The landscape then expands to reveal a shimmering lake on the left and a distant settlement with distinctive rock formations ahead, while the trail passes by wooden fences. Finally, as the path curves right, the environment shifts from the open lakeside to a more enclosed setting, with thick foliage and dense trees lining the way.
